67523.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Ginger Biscuits, Baps & Shortbread
67523.description: Paul Hollywood returns to his Merseyside roots and family, with ginger biscuits, coconut tray bake, millionaire's shortbread, and his dad's floury baps on the menu.
